notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames singles on a ground ball to shortstop Hyeseong Kim. Willy Adames to 2nd. Willy Adames advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Hyeseong Kim.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Hyeseong Kim out at 2nd. Alex Call out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Hyeseong Kim out at 2nd. Alex Call out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
